titles.en: Chapter 12 – What the wine is taken from
Chapter 12 – What the wine is taken from

segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الْخَمْرُ مِنْ خَمْسَةٍ الْعَصِيرُ مِنَ الْكَرْمِ وَ النَّقِيعُ مِنَ الزَّبِيبِ وَ الْبِتْعُ مِنَ الْعَسَلِ وَ الْمِزْرُ مِنَ الشَّعِيرِ وَ النَّبِيذُ مِنَ التَّمْرِ .
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الْخَمْرُ مِنْ خَمْسَةٍ الْعَصِيرُ مِنَ الْكَرْمِ وَ النَّقِيعُ مِنَ الزَّبِيبِ وَ الْبِتْعُ مِنَ الْعَسَلِ وَ الْمِزْرُ مِنَ الشَّعِيرِ وَ النَّبِيذُ مِنَ التَّمْرِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, altogether from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdul Rahman Bin Al Hajjaj,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘The wine is from five – the grape juice, and the marinade of the raisins, and the mead from the honey, and the ale from the barley, and Al-Nabeez from the dates’.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, altogether from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdul Rahman Bin Al Hajjaj, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘The wine is from five – the grape juice, and the marinade of the raisins, and the mead from the honey, and the ale from the barley, and Al-Nabeez from the dates’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father and Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from af-Fadf ibn Shadhan from all ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajj aj who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Intoxicating liquors are made from five kinds of substances: grape juice, extracts of raisins, al-Bit’ (mead) from honey, al-Mizru (beer) from barley and wine from dates.”’
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father and Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from af-Fadf ibn Shadhan from all ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajj aj who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Intoxicating liquors are made from five kinds of substances: grape juice, extracts of raisins, al-Bit’ (mead) from honey, al-Mizru (beer) from barley and wine from dates.”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/246)
gradings.label: حسن كالصحيح على الظاهر
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/246)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ وَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنِ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ شَاذَانَ جَمِيعاً عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْحَجَّاجِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 12 – What the wine is taken from

segments: الْخَمْرُ مِنْ خَمْسَةِ أَشْيَاءَ مِنَ التَّمْرِ وَ الزَّبِيبِ وَ الْحِنْطَةِ وَ الشَّعِيرِ وَ الْعَسَلِ .
arabic.text: الْخَمْرُ مِنْ خَمْسَةِ أَشْيَاءَ مِنَ التَّمْرِ وَ الزَّبِيبِ وَ الْحِنْطَةِ وَ الشَّعِيرِ وَ الْعَسَلِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al Hassan Al Hazramy, from the one who informed him,

(It has been narrated) from Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The wine is from five things – From the dates, and the raisins, and the wheat, and the barley, and the honey’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al Hassan Al Hazramy, from the one who informed him,

(It has been narrated) from Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The wine is from five things – From the dates, and the raisins, and the wheat, and the barley, and the honey’.

segments: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from al-Hassan al-Hadramiy from the one who narrated to him who has said the following: “Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Wine is made of five substances: Dates, raisins, wheat, barley and honey.’” Muhammad ibn Yahya from Muhammad ibn Ahmad has narrated from ibn abu Najran Safwan al- Jammal from ‘Amir ibn al-Simt from Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, a similar Hadith.
en.sarwar.text: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from al-Hassan al-Hadramiy from the one who narrated to him who has said the following: “Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Wine is made of five substances: Dates, raisins, wheat, barley and honey.’” Muhammad ibn Yahya from Muhammad ibn Ahmad has narrated from ibn abu Najran Safwan al- Jammal from ‘Amir ibn al-Simt from Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, a similar Hadith.

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/246)
gradings.label: مجهول
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/246)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ الْحَضْرَمِيِّ عَمَّنْ أَخْبَرَهُ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 12 – What the wine is taken from

segments: أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْأَشْعَرِيُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْحَجَّاجِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ الْهَاشِمِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الْخَمْرُ مِنْ خَمْسَةٍ الْعَصِيرُ مِنَ الْكَرْمِ وَ النَّقِيعُ مِنَ الزَّبِيبِ وَ الْبِتْعُ مِنَ الْعَسَلِ وَ الْمِزْرُ مِنَ الشَّعِيرِ وَ النَّبِيذُ مِنَ التَّمْرِ .
arabic.text:
.

أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْأَشْعَرِيُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْحَجَّاجِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ الْهَاشِمِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الْخَمْرُ مِنْ خَمْسَةٍ الْعَصِيرُ مِنَ الْكَرْمِ وَ النَّقِيعُ مِنَ الزَّبِيبِ وَ الْبِتْعُ مِنَ الْعَسَلِ وَ الْمِزْرُ مِنَ الشَّعِيرِ وَ النَّبِيذُ مِنَ التَّمْرِ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Safwan Al Jammal, from Aamir Bin Al Samt,
(It has been narrated) from Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> – similar to it.
Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabir, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Abdul Rahman Bin Al Hajaj, from Ali Bin Ja’far Bin Is’haq Al Hashimy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘The wine is from five – the juice from the grapes, and the marinade from the raisins, and the mead from the honey, and the ale from the barley, and Al-Nabeez from the dates’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Safwan Al Jammal, from Aamir Bin Al Samt, (It has been narrated) from Aliasws Bin Al-Husaynasws – similar to it. Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabir, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Abdul Rahman Bin Al Hajaj, from Ali Bin Ja’far Bin Is’haq Al Hashimy, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘The wine is from five – the juice from the grapes, and the marinade from the raisins, and the mead from the honey, and the ale from the barley, and Al-Nabeez from the dates’.

segments: 3. Abu Ali al-Ash‘ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajj aj from Ali ibn Ja‘far ibn Ishaq al-Hashimiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Wine is made of five substances: it is made from grape juice, extracts of raisins, al-Bit ’ (mead) from honey, al-Mizru (beer) from barley and wine from dates.’”
en.sarwar.text: 3. Abu Ali al-Ash‘ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajj aj from Ali ibn Ja‘far ibn Ishaq al-Hashimiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Wine is made of five substances: it is made from grape juice, extracts of raisins, al-Bit ’ (mead) from honey, al-Mizru (beer) from barley and wine from dates.’”

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجْرَانَ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ الْجَمَّالِ عَنْ عَامِرِ بْنِ السِّمْطِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) مِثْلَهُ
